'''famodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pygmyism|pygmyism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-m-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pygmyism|pygmyism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| famodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || fæmedheth || fæmedhej || fæmedhesh || fæmedhe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || famomodhoth || famomodhoj || famomodhosh || famomodho
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || famodhoth || famodhoj || famodhosh || famodho
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || famofdhofth || famofdhofj || famofdhofsh || famofdhof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || famodhotho || famodhojo || famodhosho || famodhoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || famodhoth || famodhoj || famodhosh || famodho
|-
| [[Possessive]] || famodhothol || famodhojol || famodhoshol || famodhokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || famodhoothotho || famodhoojojo || famodhooshosho || famodhooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || famodhothon || famodhojon || famodhoshon || famodhokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || famodhothooro || famodhojooro || famodhoshooro || famodhokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
